# Bastrop County Conservatives

> Bastrop County Conservatives (BCC) is a conservative political action committee (PAC) based in Bastrop County, Texas. BCC identifies, endorses, and supports conservative political candidates at the local level across Bastrop County.

## Mission
BCC's mission is to uphold the family values, faith, and traditions that have defined the community for over 250 years.

## Core Values
America First, Family, Freedom of Religion, Free Market, Free Speech, Grace, Individual Rights, Integrity and Honesty, Life Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness, Male and Female True, Morality, Preserving Dignity of Human Life, Respect, Servant Leadership, Small Government.

## How to Get Involved
- Join as a member: https://bastropcc.com/membership
- Volunteer: https://bastropcc.com/volunteer
- Donate: https://bastropcc.com/donate
- Subscribe to updates: https://bastropcc.com/subscribe

## Voter Resources
- Voter information and registration: https://bastropcc.com/voter-info

## Contact & Social
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BastropCountyConservatives
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bastropcountyconservatives/

## Legal
Political Advertising Paid For By Bastrop County Conservatives PAC.
